mapper.sql: f.facility_id, f.type_id, f.name, f.description, f.max_capacity, f.open_time, f.close_time, f.slot_duration, f.is_active, f.created_at, t.name AS type_name
mapper.select: SELECT type_id, name, description, created_at FROM facility_type WHERE deleted_at IS NULL -- ← 이게 있어야 해요 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility_type (name, description, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facility WHERE type_id = #{typeId}

SELECT
FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id
AND f.deleted_at IS NULL -- ← 이게 있어야 해요 AND f.type_id = #{typeId}
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.facility_id = #{facilityId}

SELECT
FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.is_active = 1 ORDER BY f.type_id, f.facility_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility (type_id, name, description, max_capacity, open_time, close_time, slot_duration, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{maxCapacity}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{slotDuration}, #{active}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE facility SET type_id = #{typeId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, slot_duration = #{slotDuration}, is_active = #{active} WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
